results.notes: data-clean: model got stuck in repetition loop, generated 65536 tokens without tool calls. Skill too long for small model.

results.description: Condensed to ~90 lines focused on CSV processing and data cleaning patterns
results.notes: Major improvement. data-clean report-accuracy 0.5 due to dates_standardized counted on all rows (7) vs expected unique rows (5).

results.description: Restructured data cleaning into explicit numbered steps with emphasis on counting before dedup
results.notes: Regression: model failed to load skill, entered repetition loop. Nondeterministic behavior with small models.

results.description: Made skill description more compelling to trigger loading; kept same code patterns
results.notes: Model loaded skill and copied code verbatim. Still dates_standardized=7 (before dedup) vs expected 5 (unique rows).

results.description: Changed code to dedup FIRST then count issues on unique rows only
results.notes: Model loaded skill but wrote its own code instead of using skill pattern. dates_standardized=7, invalid_emails check used endswith('.com'). Model capability limitation.

changes_made: Reduced SKILL.md from 573 lines to ~80 lines
Removed all SQL, visualization, report template, statistical analysis content
Focused on CSV processing with csv module and JSON output patterns
Added complete data cleaning code pattern with step-by-step comments
Changed description to encourage skill loading
remaining_issue: data-clean report-accuracy stuck at 0.5: model writes own date counting logic that counts duplicate rows (7) instead of unique rows (5). Model ignores skill code pattern despite loading it.
